markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on SEO strategy for Webflow's developer-focused content and integrations](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Developer content strategy: Publish on existing Webflow blog initially, with plans to potentially move to a dedicated developer blog (Webflow.dev) in the future](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Integrations pages: Proceed with publishing on university.webflow.com while awaiting design approval for a more permanent solution](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [AI search optimization (AEO): GrowthX to provide dashboard for measuring AI search performance, focusing on developer-related prompts](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)

## Topics

### Webflow's Current SEO Strategy

  - [Multiple surface areas: Main marketing site, University, Help Center, Marketplace (templates, Made in Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Primary focus: Bringing in new business customers](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Two main target personas: Service providers (freelancers/agencies) and in-house teams (marketers, designers, developers)](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)

### Developer Content Placement

  - [Short-term: Publish on existing Webflow blog for speed](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Long-term: Potential dedicated developer blog on Webflow.dev domain](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Concerns: Risk of content cannibalization between domains](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)

### Integrations Content Strategy

  - [Publish on university.webflow.com/integrations initially](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Work on getting design approval for a more permanent solution](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [Focus on use cases and top-of-funnel content for non-Webflow users](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### AI Search Optimization (AEO)

  - [GrowthX to provide dashboard for measuring AI search performance](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [Focus on developer-related prompts](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Challenges: Inconsistent results across AI models and user scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [Strategy: Emphasis on distribution and mentions across various platforms (YouTube, Reddit, LinkedIn)](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)

### Cross-functional Collaboration

  - [SEO efforts require coordination across multiple teams](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Vivian acts as the domain expert for SEO, facilitating discussions and bringing up issues](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to create mockups for integrations pages using Webflow's design system](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Begin publishing developer content on the existing Webflow blog](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide AI search optimization dashboard focusing on developer-related prompts](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [Vivian to facilitate conversations with internal stakeholders for integrations page approval](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [Continue alignment on developer content strategy and potential future migration to Webflow.dev](https://fathom.video/share/h_7FBuHpY__VeVtr_1s9dVAyspd3-15p?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
